items.name: Lunar Lander 2D Game
items.description: Land on the crate and get it home safely.  One of the most challenging 2D games yet!

items.name: Fiery Bone Trap
items.description: Spread these around to ambush your opponents! Trapped into these bone traps they will be decimated by wild fire!

items.name: RoVacuum 2012
items.description: Cleaning up ROBLOXia, parts and noobs alike.

items.name: Magical Rainbow Pony
items.description: Magical rainbow transport pony!!! Fell out of ReeseMcBlox's Mystery Pony Pinata.

items.name: Skeleton Slashers
items.description: Click to slash, dealing between 15 to 25 damage. Double click to dash forward and double-slash, using both arms. If you can hit your opponent with this attack, they take 30 points of damage!

items.name: Pirate Hook
items.description: Arrr! I be hooked on this weapon!

items.name: Gamaboi
items.description: Play the fabulous Quest for Glory 2! 3 ultimate boss fights will challenge you to your very core!

items.name: Sword of Ancalagon
items.description: More than a mere sword, this amazing tool shoots Ancalagon's own Dragon Fire at anyone in the area.

items.name: Eggstermination Slingshot
items.description: Sling eggs at your friends and foes to cover their screen in eggs. It's a great yolk!

items.name: Creepy Zombie Monkey
items.description: Captain Steelshank's semi-loyal companion.

items.name: Staff of the Winds
items.description: Try it for free in the ROBLOX Thanksgiving Turkey Hunt! Hold down the left mouse button to unleash a huge gust of wind that will blow away enemies and loose parts alike!

items.name: Rainbow Katana
items.description: To be victorious you must fight with all the colors of the wind.  Double click to charge the katana to do double damage.

items.name: Adventure Island
items.description: Check out the latest and best new 2D game on ROBLOX.  Explore and survive on Adventure Island!  Use "ASWD" keys to move, "W" to jump, "Enter" to shoot, and "Enter" + "W" to superjump.

items.name: Intern Racing Chair 2014
items.description: 2014 interns race in style!  Ride this chair around and shoot rockets at your foes, all from the comfort of your ROBLOX office chair.

items.name: All Hallow's Sword
items.description: Slash at your foes and deal 15 damage per hit.  If you're looking to do something a little more interesting - hit 'Q' to grow vines that will stun and trap anyone within a 15 stud radius.  The 'E' key will shoot 10 vines in front of you to hit your opponents - doing  12 damage. Finally - press the 'X' key  to activate a vine like shield, which arises from the ground and surrounds you for 20 seconds. It does 20 damage to anyone who runs into it.

items.name: Hula Dog
items.description: He thinks it's always Aloha Friday.

items.name: Sword of Starlight
items.description: You have the power of stars!

items.name: Red Hyperbike
items.description: Everyone knows red is always faster than blue.  Goes 10 faster than the original hyperbike.

items.name: ROBLOX Summer Glider
items.description: Soar high above the skies or ROBLOXIA on this stylish- limited time only - glider!

items.name: Patriot's Monster Truck
items.description: It is your duty to drive over all other RC cars. Anything less would be Un-American.

items.name: Diamond Blade Sword
items.description: What cuts like diamond? Nothing. Swing this super powerful sword over your head.  As it sparkles around you, the sword does powerful damage to your foe. If you manage to blox them, they will turn into a diamond as they fall apart.

items.name: Giant Kaiju Arms
items.description: Equip this gear to get monster-like arms. Clicking makes you punch, so you're ready for any fight.

items.name: Red Energy Sword
items.description: The last scientist who knew how to make energy swords passed away in a horrific energy sword accident.  Don't worry, he wasn't using his own energy swords (which function perfectly!).  He was testing a competitor's imitation sword when the energy suddenly exploded.  But this is not the end for energy swords!  They will live on.  How?  That's for another energy sword desciption.  How did we get these ones?  Duh - they were hidden in the scientist's basement.

items.name: Red Fidget Spinner
items.description: Red is where it's at! The fidget spinner will spin when you click on it and each time you click on it, the faster it will spin.

items.name: Military Spy Satellite
items.description: Use this spy satellite to spy on your enemies, regardless of where they are on the map.  Gives you a birds-eye-view of the map. Click on a location to zoom in and see what's going on there. Press x to leave the satellite view.

items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: SunFire Scroll
items.description: Use the power of the scroll, to unleash a torrent of sunfire blast around you!

items.name: Duck
items.description: So cute.  Less cute when he won't stop following you around.

items.name: Mythic Sword of the West Wind
items.description: May you slash with all the colors of the wind. Slash your enemies, dealing 18 to 33 damage. Enemies also get pushed back from the force of the wind. Hit the 'Q' key, to activate the special attack causing you to spin around in circles and blow away nearby enemies.

items.name: Yellow Card
items.description: Unsportmanlike Conduct!  One more time and you're out of here!

items.name: Meteor Staff
items.description: Let the fires and stones of the sky rain down upon all who dare defy you.  If your opponent gets hit by one of the meteors you summon, he will meet a swift end.  Only you are protected from the shower of debris that will rain down when you summon it.
